sound_files.file_name: Es Tan Fácil Romper un Corazón.mp3
sound_files.title: Es Tan Fácil Romper un Corazón
sound_files.lyrics:
A-F#m-D-E
D{C#m}-Bm-
D{C#m}-Bm-E
Si me llamas, y te dan ganas 
voy a decirte tantas cosas 
yo que vos, no dudaria 
con situaciones tan peligrosas. 

Las abuelas buscando bebes 
bajo las luces de neon, neon 
yo encadenado en mi habitación 
esperando que llames 
como un tonto en su primer amor. 

Es tan facil romper un corazón 
Es tan facil romper un corazón 
te alejaras, luego volveras 
uh, oh, oh, oh , ye. 

Es tan facil romper un corazón 
Es tan facil romper un corazón 
y es tan tonto el amor que se deja atrapar 
por un corazon que no sabe amar. 

Puedo gritar, puedo esperar 
porque tengo el alma dispuesta 
Y aun perdido como un disparo en la oscuridad 
sigo adelante buscando respuesta. 



Mientras tanto empujamos el mundo 
para verlo rodar y rodar 
como chicos pateando un balon 
creyendo ser 
dos bando en un callejon. 

Es tan facil romper un corazón 
Es tan facil romper un corazón 
te alejaras, luego volveras 
uh, oh, oh, oh , ye.

sound_files.lyrics:
(G-F-Am-G)x2
(F-C-G-Em)x2
(G-D-Am-C)x2

Antes de tres lunas volvería por ti
Antes de que me heces de menos
Dejaste días muertas tendidas al pasar
Nunca te he esperado tanto

A un minuto de ti
Voy de tras de ti
A un minuto de ti
Te seguiré…

El viento se a calzado sus guantes de piel
Se entretiene con mi pelo
Bebo el agua que viene conmigo estoy
Estancado en tu reflejo

Solamente de ti
 gota a gota
Solamente de ti
Veneno y sed

Llegare solo hasta el umbral
Nada que puedo perder
Me atreveré cuento un paso mas
Nada mas no soy como tu

Voy a ver 
braseo en espiral
nada
me vuelvo a repetir

saltare
planeo en rededor
nada mas
no soy como tu

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Rock En tu idioma 1/Qué puedo decir.mp3
sound_files.title: Qué puedo decir
sound_files.lyrics:
¿Por qué en el mundo hay tanto dolor? 
¿Por qué se hacen las guerras? 
¿Por qué se siembra el miedo? 
¿Por qué violamos a la Madre Tierra? 

¿Por qué se mata en nombre de Dios? 
¿Quién inventó las banderas? 
¿Por qué agonizan personas 
pidiendo auxilio en nuestras fronteras? 

¡Qué puedo decir! ¡qué voy a decir! 
no quiero hacerle daño, tengo que mentir 
¡Qué puedo decir! ¡qué voy a decir! 
sino tengo palabras, tengo que mentir 

¿Por qué me cuentan que existe un dios 
tan poderoso y perfecto? 
¿Por qué creó el sufrimiento 
y a tanto inocente condena al infierno? 

¿Por qué me hablas de amor y paz? 
si el mundo es un vertedero 
La paz muere con el odio 
y del amor es dueño el dinero 

¡Qué puedo decir! ¡qué voy a decir!... 

DESPERTAR, Y VER TU CARITA REIR 
SENTIR LO QUE NUNCA PUDE SENTIR, ES TU LUZ 

En ti pongo mi esperanza, semilla de nuestra sangre 
mi amor, mi niña, mi vida, ver tu sonrisa es un soplo de aire 
El futuro es una canción, te canto a ti, compañero 
tienen que ver nuestros hijos que el mundo tiene que tener remedio 

¡Qué puedo decir! ¡qué voy a decir! no quiero hacerle daño... 

DESPERTAR, Y VER TU CARITA REIR...

intro (Dm-A#-F-C)

Dm             A#          F         C      Dm
        Tantas cosas en la mente me aterran
      A#            F            C         Dm
el pensar en todo y nada de una vez
      A#            F
el estar dormido
      C            Dm
el soñar contigo
      A#         F        C
el permanecer perdido buscandote
   Dm-A#-F-C
Dm             A#          F         C        Dm
      Tras los muros de mi casa tan fria
         A#           F            C        Dm
puedo pensar en algo para hacer calor
     A#            F        C         Dm
el moverme me hace titubear y dudar
     A#         F            C        A#
pero esa imagen no se ira jamas
      Dm         C          Dm
el pensar en ti me hace recordar
A#         F           C         Dm
el encanto que provoca tu fragilidad
A#          F            C           Dm
quedarme sentado aquí me puede congelar
A#           F            C            Dm
el hablar de ti me puede     delatar
          A#    F                  C                   Dm
podria gritar       que me dejes beber de tu sangre
          A#    F                  C                   Dm
podria gritar       que me dejes beber de tu sangre
          A#
podria gritar...
          A#
podria gritar...
 (Dm-A#-F-C-A#)
      Dm
el pensar en ti...

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Rock En tu idioma 1/Luz de día.mp3
sound_files.title: Luz de día
sound_files.lyrics:
Am-G-F-C-G
C-G-Am-F

Luz de día

Destapa el champagne
apaga las luces
dejemos las velas encendidas 
y afuera las heridas

Ya no pienses mas
en nuestro pasado
hagamos que choquen 
nuestras copas
por habernos encontrado


Y porque puedo mirar el cielo,
besar tus manos, sentir tu cuerpo,
decir tu nombre y las caricias
seran la brisa que aviva el fuego                
de nuestro amor, de nuestro amor

Puedo ser luz de noche ser luz de dia, 
frenar el mundo por un segundo
y las caricias seran la brisa
que aviva el fuego                      
de nuestro amor, de nuestro amor.

El tiempo dejo su huella inborrable               
y aunque nuestras vidas son distintas
esta noche todo vale
tu piel y mi piel ves que se reconocen
es la memoria que hay en nuestros corazones

sound_files.title: Time To Pretend
sound_files.lyrics:
I'm feelin' rough, I'm feelin' raw
I'm in the prime of my life
Let's make some music, make some money
Find some models for wives
I'll move to Paris, shoot some heroin and fuck with the stars
You man the island and the cocaine and the elegant cars
This is our decision to live fast and die young
We've got the vision, now let's have some fun
Yeah, it's overwhelming, but what else can we do?
Get jobs in offices and wake up for the morning commute?
Forget about our mothers and our friends
We're fated to pretend
To pretend
We're fated to pretend
To pretend
I'll miss the playgrounds
And the animals and digging up worms
I'll miss the comfort of my mother
And the weight of the world
I'll miss my sister, miss my father,
Miss my dog and my home
Yeah, I'll miss the boredom
And the freedom and the time spent alone
But there is really nothing, nothing we can do
Love must be forgotten, life can always start up anew
The models will have children, we'll get a divorce
We'll find some more models, everything must run its course
We'll choke on our vomit and that will be the end
We were fated to pretend
To pretend
We're fated to pretend
To pretend
I said yeah, yeah, yeah
Yeah, yeah, yeah
Yeah, yeah, yeah
Yeah, yeah, yeah

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/new/Dear Mama.mp3
sound_files.title: Dear Mama
sound_files.lyrics:
You are appreciated
When I was young, me and my mama had beef
17 years old, kicked out on the streets
Though back at the time I never thought I'd see her face
Ain't a woman alive that could take my mama's place
Suspended from school, and scared to go home, I was a fool
With the big boys breakin' all the rules
I shed tears with my baby sister, over the years
We was poorer than the other little kids
And even though we had different daddies, the same drama
When things went wrong we'd blame Mama
I reminisce on the stress I caused, it was hell
Huggin' on my mama from a jail cell
And who'd think in elementary, hey
I'd see the penitentiary one day?
And runnin' from the police, that's right
Mama catch me, put a whoopin' to my backside
And even as a crack fiend, Mama
You always was a black queen, Mama
I finally understand
For a woman it ain't easy tryin' to raise a man
You always was committed
A poor single mother on welfare, tell me how you did it
There's no way I can pay you back
But the plan is to show you that I understand
You are appreciated
Lady, don't you know we love you? (Dear Mama)
Sweet lady, place no one above you (you are appreciated)
Sweet lady, don't you know we love you?
Now, ain't nobody tell us it was fair
No love from my daddy, 'cause the coward wasn't there
He passed away and I didn't cry, 'cause my anger
Wouldn't let me feel for a stranger
They say I'm wrong and I'm heartless, but all along
I was lookin' for a father, he was gone
I hung around with the thugs
And even though they sold drugs
They showed a young brother love
I moved out and started really hangin'
I needed money of my own, so I started slangin'
I ain't guilty, 'cause even though I sell rocks
It feels good puttin' money in your mailbox
I love payin' rent when the rent's due
I hope you got the diamond necklace that I sent to you
'Cause when I was low you was there for me
And never left me alone, because you cared for me
And I could see you comin' home after work late
You're in the kitchen, tryin' to fix us a hot plate
You just workin' with the scraps you was given
And Mama made miracles every Thanksgivin'
But now the road got rough, you're alone
You're tryin' to raise two bad kids on your own
And there's no way I can pay you back
But my plan is to show you that I understand
You are appreciated
Lady, don't you know we love you? (And dear Mama)
Sweet lady, place no one above you (you are appreciated)
Sweet lady, don't you know we love you?
Pour out some liquor and I reminisce
'Cause through the drama I can always depend on my mama
And when it seems that I'm hopeless
You say the words that can get me back in focus
When I was sick as a little kid
To keep me happy there's no limit to the things you did
And all my childhood memories
Are full of all the sweet things you did for me
And even though I act crazy
I gotta thank the Lord that you made me
There are no words that can express how I feel
You never kept a secret, always stayed real
And I appreciate how you raised me
And all the extra love that you gave me
I wish I could take the pain away
If you can make it through the night, there's a brighter day
Everything will be alright if you hold on
It's a struggle every day, gotta roll on
And there's no way I can pay you back
But my plan is to show you that I understand
You are appreciated
Lady, don't you know we love you? (Dear Mama)
Sweet lady, place no one above you (you are appreciated)
Sweet lady, don't you know we love you? (Dear Mama)
Sweet lady
Lady (dear Mama)
Lady, lady

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/new/Tom's Diner (feat. Suzanne Vega).mp3
sound_files.title: Tom's Diner (feat. Suzanne Vega)
sound_files.album: RetroSpective: The Best of Suzanne Vega
sound_files.lyrics:
I am sitting
In the morning
At the diner
On the corner
I am waiting
At the counter
For the man
To pour the coffee
And he fills it
Only halfway
And before
I even argue
He is looking
Out the window
At somebody
Coming in
"It is always
Nice to see you"
Says the man
Behind the counter
To the woman
Who has come in
She is shaking
Her umbrella
And I look
The other way
As they are kissing
Their hellos
And I'm pretending
Not to see them
And instead
I pour the milk
I open
Up the paper
There's a story
Of an actor
Who had died
While he was drinking
It was no one
I had heard of
And I'm turning
To the horoscope
And looking
For the funnies
When I'm feeling
Someone watching me
And so
I raise my head
There's a woman
On the outside
Looking inside
Does she see me?
No she does not
Really see me
'Cause she sees
Her own reflection
And I'm trying
Not to notice
That she's hitching
Up her skirt
And while she's
Straightening her stockings
Her hair
Has gotten wet
Oh this rain
It will continue
Through the morning
As I'm listening
To the bells
Of the cathedral
I am thinking
Of your voice
And of the midnight picnic
Once upon a time
Before the rain began
And I finish up my coffee
And it's time to catch the train

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/new/Boney M. - Rasputin.mp3
sound_files.title: Boney M (Rasputin)
sound_files.lyrics:
There lived a certain man in Russia long ago
He was big and strong, in his eyes a flaming glow
Most people look at him with terror and with fear
But to Moscow chicks, he was such a lovely dear
He could preach the Bible like a preacher
Full of ecstasy and fire
But he also was the kind of teacher
Women would desire

[Interlude]
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey

[Verse 1]
There lived a certain man in Russia long ago
He was big and strong, in his eyes, a flaming glow
Most people look at him with terror and with fear
But to Moscow chicks, he was such a lovely dear
He could preach the Bible like a preacher
Full of ecstasy and fire
But he also was the kind of teacher
Women would desire
See Boney M. Live
Get tickets as low as $79
You might also like
The Tortured Poets Department
But Daddy I Love Him
THE HEART PART 6
[Chorus]
Ra-Ra-Rasputin, lover of the Russian Queen
There was a cat that really was gone
Ra-Ra-Rasputin, Russia's greatest love machine
It was a shame how he carried on

[Verse 2]
He ruled the Russian land and never mind the Tsar
But the kazachok, he danced really wunderbar
In all affairs of state, he was the man to please
But he was real great when he had a girl to squeeze
For the Queen, he was no wheeler dealer
Though she'd heard the things he'd done
She believed he was a holy healer
Who would heal her son

[Chorus]
Ra-Ra-Rasputin, lover of the Russian Queen
There was a cat that really was gone
Ra-Ra-Rasputin, Russia's greatest love machine
It was a shame how he carried on

[Bridge]
But when his drinking and lusting and his hunger for power
Became known to more and more people
The demands to do something about this outrageous man became louder and louder
[Interlude]
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey

[Verse 3]
"This man's just gotta go", declared his enemies
But the ladies begged, "Don't you try to do it, please"
No doubt this Rasputin had lots of hidden charms
Though he was a brute, they just fell into his arms
Then one night, some men of higher standing
Set a trap, they're not to blame
"Come to visit us", they kept demanding
And he really came

[Chorus]
Ra-Ra-Rasputin, lover of the Russian Queen
They put some poison into his wine
Ra-Ra-Rasputin, Russia's greatest love machine
He drank it all and he said, "I feel fine"
Ra-Ra-Rasputin, lover of the Russian Queen
They didn't quit, they wanted his head
Ra-Ra-Rasputin, Russia's greatest love machine
And so they shot him 'til he was dead
[Outro]
Oh, those Russians

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Reggae en Ingles/Redemption song.mp3
sound_files.title: Redemption song
sound_files.lyrics:
Redemption song
(Canción redentora)

Old pirates yes they rob I
(Viejos piratas, si, ellos me robaron)
Sold I to the merchant ships
(y me vendieron a barcos mercantes)
Minutes after they took I
(minutos después me sacaron)
from the bottom less pit
(del agujero mas cruel)
But my hand was made strong
(Pero mis manos se hicieron fuertes)
By the hand of the almighty
(por la mano del todopoderoso)
We forward in this generation triumphantly
(Avanzamos triunfalmente en esta generación)
All I ever had is
(Todo lo que siempre he tenido)
songs of freedom
(son canciones de libertad)
Won't you help to
(nos ayudas a cantar estas)
sing these songs of freedom
(canciones de libertad?)
Cause all I ever had redemption songs,
(Porque es todo lo que tengo,)
redemption songs
(canciones redentoras.)

Emancipate yourselves from mental slavery
(Emanciparte de tu esclavitud mental)
None but ourselves
(Nadie excepto nosotros mismos)
can free our minds
(puede liberar nuestras mentes)
Have no fear for atomic energy
(No tengas miedo de la energía atómica)
Cause none of them can stop the time
(Porque ninguno de ellos puede detener el tiempo)
How long shall they kill our prophets
(Cuanto tiempo más mataran nuestros profetas)
While we stand aside and look
(Mientras nos quedamos mirando a otro lado)
Some say it's just a part of it
(Alguien dijo esto es solo una parte)
We've got to fulfill the book
(debemos también nosotros escribir en el libro)

Won't you help to sing,
(Por que no ayudas a cantar,)
these songs of freedom
(estas canciones de libertad)
Cause all I ever had,
(Porque es todo lo que tengo,)
redemption songs,
(canciones redentoras,)
redemption songs,
(canciones redentoras,)
redemption songs
(canciones redentoras.)

Emancipate yourselves from mental slavery
(Emanciparte de tu esclavitud mental)
None but ourselves
(Nadie excepto nosotros mismos)
can free our minds
(puede liberar nuestras mentes)
Have no fear for atomic energy
(No tengas miedo de la energía atómica)
Cause none of them can stop the time
(Porque ninguno de ellos puede detener el tiempo)
How long shall they kill our prophets
(Cuanto tiempo más mataran nuestros profetas)
While we stand aside and look
(Mientras nos quedamos mirando a otro lado)
Yes some say it's just part of it
(Alguien dijo esto es solo una parte)
We've got to
(debemos también nosotros)
fulfill the book
(escribir en el libro)

Won't you help to sing,
(Por que no ayudas a cantar,)
these songs of freedom
(estas canciones de libertad)
Cause all I ever had,
(Porque es todo lo que tengo,)
redemption songs
(canciones redentoras)
All I ever had,
(Todo lo que tengo,)
redemption songs
(canciones redentoras)
These songs of freedom,
(Estas canciones de libertad,)
songs of freedom
(canciones de libertad)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Reggae en Ingles/Jungle.mp3
sound_files.title: Jungle
sound_files.lyrics:
Jungle
(Jungle)

I see the way you move
(Veo la manera en que te mueves)
It's fluid
(Es fluida)
Be here by my side
(Quedate a mi lado)
Got nothing to hide
(No tengo nada que esconder)
I know that you're hurting
(Se que estas herido)
I see the tears behind those eyes
(Veo las lagrimas tras esos ojos)
And I can't wipe them clear
(Y no puedo limpiarlas)

Your love is like gold to me
(Tu amor es oro para mi)
But you hold me closer to the light
(Pero me sostienes cerca de la luz)
You will not find a bullet inside
(No encontraras una bala dentro)
Unless you magnify
(A menos que magnifiques)
But you throw me into the deep end
(Pero me arrojas al fondo)
Expect me to know how to swim
(Esperando que sepa como nadar)
And I put my faith inside my hands
(Y pongo mi fe en tus manos)
Cause I will be just fine
(Por que se que estaré bien)

Welcome to the jungle
(Bienvenido a la jungla)
Are you gonna dance with me
(Vas a bailar conmigo?)
Welcome to the jungle
(Bienvenido a la jungla)
You got to close your eyes and see
(Tienes que cerrar los ojos y ver)
Welcome to the jungle
(Bienvenido a la jungla)
Are you gonna dance with me
(Vas a bailar conmigo?)
Well hold on
(Soportaremos)

Suit and tie with the black jeans on
(Traje y corbata con jeans negros)
And I'm paralyzed
(Y estoy paralizada)
Cos' I think you got something like
(Por que creo que tienes algo como)
the biggest soul I've ever seen
(el alma mas grande que he visto)
And I think you're the one
(Y creo que tu eres el indicado)
Suit and tie, with the curly hair
(Traje y corbata, con el cabello rizado)
Making your way with that step and stare
(Haciéndote camino con ese paso y esa mirada)
So tell me real, do you feel anything
(Asi que se honesto, sientes algo?)

Ashes to ashes
(Cenizas a las cenizas)
And the embers are ablaze
(Y las brazas estan en llamas)
I gotta rise amongst you, though
(sin embargo tengo que subir entre uds)
Then I think about your face every day
(Entonces pienso en tu cara todo los dias)
But you pull me closer to the light
(Pero me sostienes cerca de la luz)
You wouldn't find a bullet inside
(No encontraras una bala dentro)
Only if you magnify
(Solo si te magnificas)
Well hold on
(Soportaremos)

sound_files.title: Three little birds
sound_files.lyrics:
Three little birds
(Tres pajaritos)

Don't worry about a thing
(No te preocupes por nada)
Cause every little thing is gonna be alright
(Porque todo va a estar bien)
Singin' don't worry about a thing
(Canta no te preocupes por nada)
Cause every little thing is gonna be alright
(Porque todo va a estar bien)

Rise up this morning, smile with the rising sun
(El sol sale esta mañana, sonríe con el sol naciente)
Three little birds, sit by my doorstep
(Tres pequeños pájaros sentados)
Singing sweet songs of melodies pure and true
(Cantando dulces canciones de melodías puras y verdaderas)
Singin' this is my message to you-ou-ou
(Canta este es mi mensaje para ti)

Singin' don't worry about a thing
(No te preocupes por nada)
Cause every little thing is gonna be alright
(Porque todo va a estar bien)
Singin' don't worry about a thing
(Canta no te preocupes por nada)
Cause every little thing is gonna be alright
(Porque todo va a estar bien)

Rise up this morning, smile with the rising sun
(El sol sale esta mañana, sonríe con el sol naciente)
Three little birds, sit by my doorstep
(Tres pequeños pájaros sentados)
Singing sweet songs of melodies pure and true
(Cantando dulces canciones de melodías puras y verdaderas)
Singin' this is my message to you-ou-ou
(Canta este es mi mensaje para ti)

Singin' don't worry about a thing
(No te preocupes por nada)
Cause every little thing is gonna be alright
(Porque todo va a estar bien)
Singin' don't worry about a thing
(Canta no te preocupes por nada)
Cause every little thing is gonna be alright
(Porque todo va a estar bien)
Singin' don't worry...
(Canta no te preocupes...)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Reggae en Ingles/Baby, I Love Your Way.mp3
sound_files.title: Baby, I Love Your Way
sound_files.lyrics:
Baby I Love Your Way
(Bebé, amo tu camino)

Ooh, baby, I love your way,
(Ooh, cariño, amo tu camino,)
everyday, yeah
(todos los días, sí)

Shadows grow so long before my eyes
(Las sombras crecen mucho antes de mis ojos)
And they're moving across the page
(Y se están moviendo a través de la página)
Suddenly the day turns into night
(De repente, el día se convierte en noche)
Far away from the city
(Lejos de la ciudad)

Well, don't, ah no, hesitate
(Bueno, no lo hagas, ah no, vacila)
'Cause your love just won't wait, yeah
(Porque tu amor simplemente no espera, sí)

Ooh, baby, I love your way, everyday, yeah
(Ooh, cariño, amo tu camino, todos los días, sí)
I wanna tell you I love your way, everyday, yeah
(Quiero decirte que amo tu camino, todos los días, sí)
I wanna be with you night and day
(Quiero estar contigo día y noche)

The moon appears to shine and light the skies
(La luna parece brillar y encender los cielos)
With the help of some fireflies
(Con la ayuda de algunas luciérnagas)
I wonder how they have the power to shine
(Me pregunto cómo tienen el poder de brillar)
I can see them under the pine
(Puedo verlos bajo el pino)

But don't, no, no, hesitate
(Pero no, no, no, dude)
'Cause your love won't wait
(Porque tu amor no espera)

I can see the sunset in your eyes
(Puedo ver la puesta de sol en tus ojos)
Brown and grey, and blue besides
(Marrón y gris, y azul además)
Clouds are stalking islands in the sun
(Las nubes acechan islas en el sol)
I wish I could buy one out of season
(Ojalá pudiera comprar uno fuera de temporada)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Troba/Flores de fuego.mp3
sound_files.lyrics:
FLORES DE FUEGO

México no llores,
América nombra el tiempo de invasores
México no llores,
No han tocado las raíces de tus flores

Te ha quedado el coraje
Carne eterna de maíz
Surco a surco ya se siembra
Una bala y es por ti
Para defender la tierra
Se siembra para vivir

México no llores,
En tu tierra cantan los agricultores
México no llores,
Lo sembrado es cosecha en sembradores

Por el que dará su vida por enseñar a leer
Veras las flores de fuego que han brotado desde ayer
Las cactus naciones viejas, México harán volver
Que hoy con los pies quemados…todavía te ves correr

México préstame tu arado,
Que voy hacer un camino
Donde el campesino camine sin cuidado
Que voy a sembrar el coraje con cada canto
Nacido del sudor agricultor
¡Que no quede un pedazo de tu suelo sin germinar!
¡Que no quede un grito de llanto sin saldar!
México de la nopalera y el bejuco al asfalto, al concreto
¡México porque eres guardián del mundo!
¡Te sigues llamando México!…

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Mandy.mp3
sound_files.title: Mandy
sound_files.lyrics:
MANDY
(MANDY)

Remember all my life 
(Recuerda toda mi vida)
raining down as cold as ice. 
(Lloviendo tan frío como el hielo.)
Shadows of a man, 
(Sombras de un hombre,)
a face through a window
(una cara a través de una ventana)
cryin' in the night, 
(llorando en la noche,)
the night goes into 
(la noche entra)

Morning just another day; 
(Mañana solo otro día;)
happy people pass my way. 
(las personas felices se cruzan en mi camino.)
Looking in their eyes, 
(Mirando en sus ojos,)
I see a memory
(Veo un recuerdo)
I never realized 
(Nunca me di cuenta)
how happy you made me. 
(que feliz me hiciste)

Oh Mandy well, 
(Oh, Mandy, bien,)
you came and you gave without taking, 
(viniste y diste sin tomar,)
but I sent you away. 
(pero te envié lejos.)
Oh, Mandy well, 
(Oh, Mandy bien,)
you kissed me and stopped me from shaking, 
(me besaste y me impidió temblar,)
and I need you today.
(y te necesito hoy.)
Oh, Mandy! 
(¡Oh, Mandy!)

I'm standing on the edge of time; 
(Estoy parado al borde del tiempo;)
I walked away when love was mine. 
(Me alejé cuando el amor era mío.)
Caught up in a world
(Atrapado en un mundo)
of uphill climbing, 
(de escalada cuesta arriba,)
the tears are in my mind 
(las lágrimas están en mi mente)
and nothin' is rhyming. 
(y nada está rimando.)

Oh Mandy well, 
(Oh, Mandy, bien,)
you came and you gave without taking, 
(viniste y diste sin tomar,)
but I sent you away. 
(pero te envié lejos.)
Oh, Mandy well, 
(Oh, Mandy bien,)
you kissed me and stopped me from shaking, 
(me besaste y me impidió temblar,)
and I need you today. Oh, Mandy! 
(y te necesito hoy. ¡Oh, Mandy!)

Yesterday's a dream, I face the morning 
(Ayer es un sueño, me enfrento a la mañana)
cryin' on a breeze, the pain is callin' 
(llorando con la brisa, el dolor llama)

Oh Mandy well, 
(Oh, Mandy, bien,)
you came and you gave without taking, 
(viniste y diste sin tomar,)
but I sent you away. 
(pero te envié lejos.)
Oh, Mandy well, 
(Oh, Mandy bien,)
you kissed me and stopped me from shaking, 
(me besaste y me impidió temblar,)
and I need you today 
(y te necesito hoy)

Oh Mandy, 
(Oh Mandy,)
you came and you gave without taking, 
(viniste y diste sin tomar,)
but I sent you away. 
(pero te envié lejos.)
Oh, Mandy,well 
(Oh, Mandy, bueno)
you kissed me and stopped me from shaking, 
(me besaste y me impidió temblar,)
and I need you! 
(¡y te necesito!)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Can't Get Enough Of Your Love Baby.mp3
sound_files.file_name: Can't Get Enough Of Your Love Baby.mp3
sound_files.title: Can't Get Enough Of Your Love Baby
sound_files.lyrics:
Cant get enough of your love, babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor, nena)

I've heard people say that
(He escuchado a gente decir que)
Too much of anything is not good for you, baby
(Mucho de nada no es bueno para ti, nena)

But I don't know about that
(Pero yo no sé sobre eso)
There's many times that we've loved
(Han sido tantas las veces que hemos amado)
We've shared love and made love
(Hemos compartido amor y hecho el amor)
It doesn't seem to me like it's enough
(No me parece que es suficiente)
There's just not enough of it
(Simplemente no es suficiente)
There's just not enough
(Simplemente no es suficiente)
Oh oh, babe
(Oh oh, nena)

My darling, 
(Querida mía,)
I can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Girl, I don't know, I don't know why
(Chica, yo no sé, no sé por qué)
Can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Oh, some things 
(Oh, hay algunas cosas)
I can't get used to
(a las que no me puedo acostumbrar)
No matter how I try
(No importa como intente)
Just like the more you give, the more I want
(Es como si entre más me das, más quiero)
And baby, that's no lie
(Y nena, esa no es ninguna mentira)
Oh no, babe
(Oh no, nena)

Tell me, what can I say?
(¿Dime que puedo decir?)
What am I gonna do? 
(¿Que voy a hacer?)
How should I feel when everything is you?
(¿Como me debería de sentir cuando todo lo eres tu?)
What kind of love is this that you're givin' me?
(¿Que clase de amor es este que me estás dando?)
Is it in your kiss or just because you're sweet?
(¿Está en tus besos o solo porque eres dulce?)

Girl, 
(Chica,)
all I know is every time you're here
(todo lo que sé es que cada vez que estás aquí)
I feel the change
(Siento el cambio)
Somethin' moves
(Algo se mueve)
I scream your name
(Grito tu nombre)
Do whatcha got to do (?)
(Haz lo que tengas que hacer [?])

Darling,
(Querida,)
I can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Girl, I don't know, 
(Chica, yo no sé,)
I don't know why
(no sé por qué)
I can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Oh no, babe
(Oh no, nena)

Girl, if I could only make you see
(Chica, si solo pudiera hacerte ver)
And make you understand
(Y hacerte entender)
Girl, your love for me is all I need
(Chica tu amor por mí es todo lo que necesito)
And more than I can stand
(Y más de lo que puedo soportar)
Oh well, babe
(Oh bien, nena)

How can I explain all the things I feel?
(¿Como puedo explicar todas las cosas que siento?)
You've given me so much
(Me has dado tanto)
Girl, you're so unreal
(Chica, eres tan irreal)
Still I keep loving you
(Aun te sigo amando)
More and more each time
(Más y más cada vez)
Girl, what am I gonna do
(¿Chica que voy a hacer?)
Because you blow my mind
(Porque cautivas mi mente)

I get the same old feelin' 
(Y me llega el mismo viejo sentimiento)
every time you're here
(cuando estás aquí)
I feel the change
(Siento el cambio)
Somethin' moves
(Algo se mueve)
I scream your name
(Grito tu nombre)
Do whatcha got to do (?)
(Haz lo que tengas que hacer [?])

Darling, 
(Querida,)
I can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Oh no, babe
(Oh no, nena)

Baby, let me take all of my life to find you
(Nena, deja que me tome toda la vida encontrarte)
But you can believe it's gonna take 
(Pero será mejor que creas)
the rest of my life to keep you
(que me va a tomar el resto de mi vida retenerte)

Oh no, babe
(Oh no, nena)
My darling,
(Querida mía,)
I can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Yeah, I don't know,
(Sí, yo no sé,)
I don't know why
(no sé, no sé por qué)
Can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Oh my darling,
(Oh querida mía,)
I can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Oh babe
(Oh nena)
I don't know, I don't know, I don't know why
(Sí, yo no sé, no sé, no sé por qué)
I can't get enough of your love babe
(No puedo tener suficiente de tu amor nena)
Oh babe
(Oh nena)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Pretty Woman.mp3
sound_files.title: Pretty Woman
sound_files.lyrics:
Oh, Pretty Woman
Bob Smart Singers

Pretty woman, walkin' down the street
(Mujer bonita, caminando por la calle)
Pretty woman the kind I'd like to meet
(Mujer bonita del tipo que me gustaría conocer)
Pretty woman I don't believe you, you're not the truth
(Linda mujer, no te creo, no eres la verdad)
No one could look as good as you - mercy
(Nadie podría verse tan bien como tú - misericordia)

Pretty woman won't you pardon me
(Mujer bonita, ¿no me perdonas?)
Pretty woman I couldn't help but see
(Mujer bonita que no pude evitar ver)
Pretty woman that you look lovely as can be
(Mujer bonita que te ves preciosa como puede ser)
Are you lonely just like me
(¿Estás solo como yo?)

Pretty woman stop awhile
(Mujer bonita, pare un rato)
Pretty woman talk awhile
(Mujer bonita hablar un rato)
Pretty woman give your smile to me
(Linda mujer dame tu sonrisa)

Pretty woman yeah, yeah, yeah
(Mujer bonita, sí, sí, sí)
Pretty woman look my way
(Mujer bonita mira mi camino)
Pretty woman say you'll stay with me
(Mujer bonita dice que te quedarás conmigo)
Cause I need you, I'll treat you right
(Porque te necesito, te trataré bien)
Come with me baby, be mine tonight
(Ven conmigo bebé, sé mío esta noche)

Pretty woman don't walk on by
(Linda mujer no camine por)
Pretty woman don't make me cry
(Linda mujer no me hagas llorar)
Pretty woman don't walk away, hey----OK
(Mujer bonita, no te vayas, oye ---- OK)
If that's the way it must be---OK
(Si así es como debe ser --- OK)

I guess I'll go on home, it's late
(Supongo que iré a casa, es tarde)
There'll be tomorrow night, but wait
(Habrá mañana por la noche, pero espera)
What do I see?
(¿Que es lo que veo?)
Is she walkin' back to me?
(¿Ella está caminando hacia mí?)
Yeah, she's walkin' back to me
(Sí, ella está caminando de regreso a mí)
Oh, oh, pretty woman
(Oh, oh, linda mujer)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Telephone Line.mp3
sound_files.title: Telephone Line
sound_files.lyrics:
Telephone line
(Línea telefónica)

Hello, how are you
(Hola ¿Cómo estás?)
Have you been alright
(¿Has estado bien)
Thru all those lonely, lonely, lonely,
(Todas esas solitarias, solitarias, solitarias,)
Lonely, lonely nights
(Solitarias, solitarias noches?)
That's what I'd say
(Eso es lo que diría)
I'd tell you ev'rything if you'd pick up
(Te diría todo si descolgaras)
That telephone yeah, yeah, yeah
(Ese teléfono sí, sí, sí)

Hey how you feelin'
(¿Hey, cómo te has sentido,)
Are you still the same
(Sigues siendo la misma?)
Don't you realize the things we did,
(Te das cuenta que las cosas que hicimos,)
we did
(hicimos)
Were all for real not a dream
(Fueron reales, no un sueño?)
I just can't believe they've all
(Simplemente no puedo creer)
faded out of view
(que se desvanecieran)
Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah
(Sí, sí, sí, sí)
Oo oo oo oo
(Oo oo oo oo)

Doo da wop
(Doo da wop)
Dee bee doo da wop
(Dee bee doo da wop)
Doo wah doo lang
(Doo wah doo lang)

Blue days black night
(Días azules, noche negra)
Doo wah dee lang
(Doo wah dee lang)
I look into the sky
(Veo en el cielo)
Your luck ain't really
(Tu suerte en realidad)
gonna see you through
(no va a ayudar a salir de esta)
And I wonder why the little things
(Y me pregunto por qué las cosas pequeñas)
Are fin'ly comi' true
(Finalmente se están volviendo realidad)
Oh, oh telephone line
(Oh, oh línea telefónica)
Give me some time
(Dame algo de tiempo)
I'm living in twilight
(Estoy viviendo en el anochecer)
Oh, oh telephone line
(Oh, oh línea telefónica)
Give me some time
(Dame algo de tiempo)
I'm living in twilight
(Estoy viviendo en el anochecer)

O.K., so no one's answering
(Está bien, así que no vas a contestar)
Well can't you just let it ring
(Bueno ¿No puedes solo dejarlo sonar)
A little longer, longer, longer
(Un poco más, más, más?)
Oh, I'll just sit tight through
(Oh, solo aguantaré)
shadows of the night
(las sombras de la noche)
Let it ring for ever more
(Lo dejaré sonar para siempre)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Happy Together.mp3
sound_files.title: Happy Together - 1967
sound_files.lyrics:
The Turtles-Happy Together
(Las tortugas felices juntas)

Imagine me and you, I do
(Imagínate tú y yo, lo hago)
I think about you day and night, 
(Pienso en ti día y noche,)
it's only right
(es solo correcto)
To think about the girl you love
(Pensar en la chica que amas)
and hold her tight
(y abrazarla fuerte)
So happy together
(Tan felices juntos)

If I should call you up,
(Si te llamara,)
invest a dime
(invertir un centavo)
And you say you belong to me
(Y dices que me perteneces)
and ease my mind
(y tranquilizar mi mente)
Imagine how the world could be,
(Imagina cómo podría ser el mundo,)
so very fine
(muy bien)
So happy together
(Tan felices juntos)

I can't see me lovin' nobody but you
(No puedo verme amando a nadie más que a ti)
For all my life
(Para toda mi vida)
When you're with me,
(Cuando estás conmigo,)
baby the skies'll be blue
(bebé, los cielos serán azules)
For all my life
(Para toda mi vida)

Me and you and you and me
(Yo y tu, tu y yo)
No matter how they toss the dice,
(No importa cómo tiran los dados,)
it had to be
(tenia que ser)
The only one for me is you,
(El único para mí eres tú,)
and you for me
(y tu para mi)
So happy together
(Tan felices juntos)

Me and you and you and me
(Yo y tu, tu y yo)
No matter how they toss the dice
(No importa cómo tiran los dados)
it had to be
(tenia que ser)
The only one for me is you,
(El único para mí eres tú,)
and you for me
(y tu para mi)
So happy together
(Tan felices juntos)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Do You Believe in Magic.mp3
sound_files.title: Do You Believe in Magic?
sound_files.lyrics:
Do You Believe in Magic
(Crees en la magia)
The Lovin 'Spoonful
(El Lovin 'Spoonful)

Do you believe in magic 
(Crees en la magia)
in a young girl's heart
(en el corazón de una niña)
How the music can free her,
(Cómo la música puede liberarla,)
whenever it starts
(cada vez que comienza)
And it's magic,
(Y es magia,)
if the music is groovy
(si la música es maravillosa)

It makes you feel happy
(Te hace sentir feliz)
like an old-time movie
(como una película de antaño)
I'll tell you about the magic,
(Te contaré sobre la magia,)
and it'll free your soul
(y liberará tu alma)
But it's like trying to tell
(Pero es como tratar de decir)
a stranger 'bout rock and roll
(un extraño sobre rock and roll)

If you believe in magic,
(Si crees en la magia,)
do not bother to choose
(no te molestes en elegir)
If it's jug band music
(Si es música de banda jar)
or rhythm and blues
(o ritmo y blues)

Just go and listen
(Solo ve y escucha)
it's start with a smile
(comienza con una sonrisa)
It will not wipe off your 
(No borrará su)
face no matter how hard you try
(enfrentar sin importar cuánto lo intentes)

Your feet start tapping
(Tus pies comienzan a tocar)
and you can not seem to find
(y parece que no puedes encontrar)
How did you get there,
(Cómo llegaste allí,)
so just blow your mind
(así que deja volar tu mente)

the music and the music's in me

but what else can we do

I wish I could carry

what tomorrow could bring

doesn't really know

are you feeling it too

 if I called on you now

And said that I can't hold on

There's no easy way,

it gets harder each day

Please love me or I'll be gone,
(Por favor, ámame o me iré,)
I'll be gone

Oh, what are you thinking of

What are you thinking of

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Hello Mary Lou.mp3
sound_files.title: Hello Mary Lou
sound_files.lyrics:
Hello Mary Lou
Ricky Nelson

Hello Mary Lou
(Hola Mary Lou)
Goodbye heart
(Adios corazon)
Sweet Mary Lou
(Dulce maría lou)
I'm so in love with you
(Estoy tan enamorado de ti)

I knew Mary Lou
(Yo conocía a Mary Lou)
We'd never part
(Nunca nos separaríamos)
So hello Mary Lou
(Así que hola Mary Lou)
Goodbye heart
(Adios corazon)

You passed me by one sunny day
(Me pasaste un día soleado)
Flashed those big brown eyes my way
(Parpadeé esos grandes ojos marrones a mi manera)
And ooh I wanted you forever more
(Y ooh te quise para siempre)

Now I'm not one that gets around
(Ahora no soy uno que se mueve)
I swear my feet stuck to the ground
(Juro que mis pies pegados al suelo)
And though I never did meet you before
(Y aunque nunca te conocí antes)

I saw your lips I heard your voice
(Vi tus labios, escuché tu voz)
Believe me I just had no choice
(Créeme, simplemente no tuve elección)
Wild horses couldn't make me stay away
(Los caballos salvajes no podían hacer que me mantuviera alejado)

I thought about a moonlit night
(Pensé en una noche de luna)
Arms around you, good an' tight
(Brazos a tu alrededor, bien y apretados)
All I had to see for me to say
(Todo lo que tenía que ver para que yo dijera)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Wouldn't It Be Nice.mp3
sound_files.title: Wouldn't It Be Nice
sound_files.lyrics:
Wouldn't It Be Nice
(No sería bueno)

Wouldn't it be nice if we were older?
(¿No sería bueno si fuéramos mayores?)
Then we wouldn't have to wait so long
(Entonces no tendríamos que esperar tanto)
And wouldn't it be nice to live together
(Y no sería lindo vivir juntos)
In the kind of world where we belong
(En el tipo de mundo al que pertenecemos)

You know it's gonna make it that much better
(Sabes que lo hará mucho mejor)
When we can say goodnight and stay together
(Cuando podemos decir buenas noches y permanecer juntos)

Wouldn't it be nice if we could wake up
(¿No sería bueno si pudiéramos despertarnos?)
In the morning when the day is new?
(Por la mañana cuando el día es nuevo?)
And after having spent the day together
(Y después de pasar el día juntos)
Hold each other close the whole night through
(Manténganse cerca durante toda la noche)

Happy times together we've been spending
(Felices momentos juntos hemos estado gastando)
I wish that every kiss was never ending
(Desearía que cada beso nunca terminara)
Wouldn't it be nice?
(¿No sería agradable?)

Maybe if we think, and wish, and hope, and pray, it might come true
(Tal vez si pensamos, deseamos, esperamos y oramos, podría hacerse realidad)
Baby, then there wouldn't be a single thing we couldn't do
(Bebé, entonces no habría una sola cosa que no pudiéramos hacer)
We could be married
(Podríamos estar casados)
And then we'd be happy
(Y entonces estaríamos felices)

Wouldn't it be nice?
(¿No sería agradable?)
You know it seems the more we talk about it
(Sabes que parece que cuanto más hablamos de eso)
It only makes it worse to live without it
(Solo empeora vivir sin él)
But let's talk about it
(Pero hablemos de eso)
Wouldn't it be nice?
(¿No sería agradable?)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/A Horse with No Name.mp3
sound_files.title: A Horse with No Name
sound_files.lyrics:
A horse with no name
(Un caballo sin nombre)

On the first part of the journey
(En la primer parte del viaje)
I was looking at all the life
(estuve mirando toda la vida)
There were plants and birds
(Había plantas y aves,)
and rocks and things
(y rocas y cosas)
There was sand and hills and rings
(Había arena y colinas y anillos)
The first thing
(Lo primero que)
I met was a fly with a buzz
(conocí fue una mosca con zumbido)
And the sky with no clouds
(Y el cielo sin nubes)
The heat was hot and the ground was dry
(Estaba caluroso y el piso seco)
But the air was full of sound
(Pero el aire estaba lleno de sonido)

I've been through the desert
(He estado a través del desierto)
on a horse with no name
(en un caballo sin nombre)
It felt good to be out of the rain
(Se sentía bien estar lejos de la lluvia)
In the desert you can remember your name
(En el desierto tú puedes recordar tu nombre)
'Cause there ain't no one for to give you no pain
(Porque allí no hay nadie para darte dolor)

After two days in the desert sun
(Después de dos días en el sol del desierto)
my skin began to turn red
(mi piel se puso roja)
After three days in
(Después de tres días en)
the desert fun 
(la diversión del desierto)
I was looking at a river bed
(yo buscaba una cama de río)
And the story it told
(Y la historia que ha contado)
of a river that flowed
(de un río que fluía)
Made me sad to think it was dead
(Me puso triste pensar que estaba muerto)

You see I've been through
(He estado a través)
the desert on a horse with no name
(del desierto en un caballo sin nombre)
It felt good to be out of the rain
(Se sentía bien estar lejos de la lluvia)
In the desert you can remember your name
(En el desierto tú puedes recordar tu nombre)
'Cause there ain't no one for to give you no pain
(Porque allí no hay nadie para darte dolor)

After nine days
(Después de nueve días)
I let the horse run free 
(dejé al caballo correr libre)
'cause the desert had turned to sea
(porque el desierto se convirtió en mar)
There were plants and birds
(Había plantas y aves)
and rocks and things
(y rocas y cosas)
There was sand and hills and rings
(Había arena y colinas y anillos)
The ocean is a desert
(El océano es un desierto)
with it's life underground
(con su vida bajo la tierra)
And a perfect disguise above
(Y un perfecto disfraz encima)
Under the cities lies
(Bajo las ciudades yace)
a heart made of ground
(un corazón hecho de tierra)
But the humans will give no love
(Pero los humanos no le darán amor)

You see I've been through the desert
(He estado a través del desierto)
on a horse with no name
(en un caballo sin nombre)
It felt good to be out of the rain
(Se sentía bien estar lejos de la lluvia)
In the desert you can remember your name
(En el desierto tú puedes recordar tu nombre)
'Cause there ain't no one for to give you no pain
(Porque allí no hay nadie para darte dolor)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/Ingles Old/Johnny be good.mp3
sound_files.title: Johnny be good
sound_files.lyrics:
Johnny B. Goode
(Johnny B. Goode)

Deep down louisiana close to new orleans 
(En lo profundo de Luisiana cerca de Nueva Orleans)
Way back up in the woods among the evergreens 
(Camino de regreso en el bosque entre los árboles de hoja perenne)
There stood a log cabin made of earth and wood 
(Allí estaba una cabaña de madera y madera)
Where lived a country boy named Gohnny B. Goode 
(Donde vivía un muchacho de campo llamado Gohnny B. Goode)
Who never ever learned to read or write so well 
(Quien nunca aprendió a leer o escribir tan bien)
But he could play the guitar just like a ringing a bell 
(Pero él podía tocar la guitarra como una campana)

He used to carry his guitar in a gunny sack 
(Él solía llevar su guitarra en un saco de gunny)
Go sit beneath the tree by the railroad track
(Ir sentarse debajo del árbol por la vía férrea)
the engineerswould see him sitting in the shade 
(los ingenieros lo verían sentado a la sombra)
Strumming with the rhythm that the drivers made 
(Rasgueando con el ritmo que los conductores hicieron)
People passing by they would stop and say 
(La gente que pasaba por allí se detenía y decía)
Oh my that little country boy could play 
(Oh, ese pequeño chico del campo podría jugar)

His mother told him "someday you will be a man, 
(Su madre le dijo: "Algún día serás un hombre,)
And you will be the leader of a big old band. 
(Y serás el líder de una gran banda antigua.)
Many people coming from miles around 
(Mucha gente que viene de millas alrededor)
To hear you play your music when the sun go down 
(Para escucharte tocar tu música cuando el sol se pone)
Maybe someday your name will be in lights 
(Tal vez algún día tu nombre estará en luces)
Saying Johnny B. Goode tonight." 
(Decir a Johnny B. Goode esta noche.)

Earth angel

earth angel

wil you be mine?

my darling dear,love you all the time

a fool inlove with you
(un tonto enamorado de ti)

earth angel

the one i adore
(la adoro i)
love you for ever and ever more
(Te quiero para siempre y cada vez más)
i´m just a fool a fool
(Sólo soy un tonto un tonto)
inlove with you
(enamorado de ti)

i fell for you
(Me caí para usted)
and i knew
(y yo sabía)
the vision of your love
(la visión de tu amor)
loveliness
(hermosura)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/news/Livin in the Sunlight.mp3
sound_files.title: Livin' in the Sunlight
sound_files.lyrics:
[Verse]
I'm so happy, happy-go-lucky me
I just go my way, living every day
I don't worry, worrying don't agree
Winter, fall, and spring, I just smile and sing:

[Chorus 1]
Things that bother you never bother me
I think everything's fine
Living in the sunlight, loving in the moonlight
Having a glorious time
Haven't got a lot, I don't need a lot
Coffee's only a dime
Living in the sunlight, loving in the moonlight
Having a marvelous time
Just take it from me, I'm just as free as any dove
I do what I like, just when I like, and how I love it
I don't give a hoot, give my cares the boot
All the world is in rhyme
Living in the sunlight, loving in the moonlight
Having a wonderful time!

[Chorus 2]
I go swimming with pretty women
And I find life is divine
Swimming in the sunlight, swimming in the moonlight
Having a glorious time
When I'm stepping out with my runabout
How we step is a crime
Starting in the moonlight, ending in the sunlight
Having a marvelous time
I bet what I like, get what I like, once in a while
But if she says "No!", I let her go, and keep on smiling
I'm right here to stay, when I'm old and grey
I'll be right in my prime
Kissing in the sunlight, loving in the moonlight
Having a wonderful time !
You might also like
The Aristocats
Walt Disney Records
Fortnight
Taylor Swift
So Long, London
Taylor Swift
[Musical Interlude]

[Final Chorus]
I'm right here to stay, when I'm old and grey
I'll be right in my prime, ooh!
Kissing in the sunlight, loving in the moonlight
Having a wonderful time!

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/news/Pink Floyd - Coming back to life.mp3
sound_files.file_name: Pink Floyd - Coming back to life.mp3
sound_files.title: Pink Floyd - Coming back to life [lyrics on screen
sound_files.lyrics:
Where were you
When I was burned and broken?
While the days slipped by
From my window watching

And where were you
When I was hurt and I was helpless?
'Cause the things you say
And the things you do surround me

While you were hanging yourself
On someone else's words
Dying to believe in what you heard
I was staring straight into the shining Sun

Lost in thought and lost in time
While the seeds of life
And the seeds of change were planted
Outside, the rain fell dark and slow
While I pondered on this dangerous
But irresistible pastime

I took a heavenly ride through our silence
I knew the moment had arrived
For killing the past and coming back to life

I took a heavenly ride through our silence
I knew the waiting had begun
And headed straight into the shining Sun

Oh, now go,
Walk out the door.

You're not welcome anymore.

I've got all my life to live.
I've got all my love to give.
I will survive.
I will survive.

It took all the strength I had
Just not to fall apart.
I'm trying hard to mend
The pieces of my broken heart.
And I spent oh so many nights
Just feeling sorry for myself.
I used to cry.
But now I hold my head up high.

And you'll see me with somebody new.
I'm not that stupid little person
Still in love with you.
And so you thought you'd just drop by,
And you expect me to be free.
But now I'm saving all my lovin'
For someone who's lovin' me.

Oh now go.
Walk out the door.
Just turn around now.
You're not welcome anymore.
Weren't you the one
Who tried to break me with desire?
Did you think I'd crumble?
Did you think I'd lay down and die?
Oh not I.

I will survive.
As long as I know how to love
I know I'll be alive.
I've got all my life to live.
I've got all my love to give.
I will survive.
I will survive.

sound_files.title: rises the moon
sound_files.lyrics:
Days seem sometimes as if they'll never end
Sun digs its heels to taunt you
But after sunlit days, one thing stays the same
Rises the moon
Days fade into a watercolour blur
Memories swim and haunt you
But look into the lake, shimmering like smoke
Rises the moon
Oh-oh, close your weary eyes
I promise you that soon the autumn comes
To darken fading summer skies
Breathe, breathe, breathe
Days pull you down just like a sinking ship
Floating is getting harder
But tread the water, child, and know that meanwhile
Rises the moon
Days pull you up just like a daffodil

They'll tell you what you owe, but know even so
Rises the moon
You'll be visited by sleep
I promise you that soon the autumn comes
To steal away each dream you keep
Breathe, breathe, breathe

sound_files.title: The Big Bang Theory Theme
sound_files.lyrics:
Our whole universe was in a hot dense state
Then nearly fourteen billion years ago expansion started
Wait

The Earth began to cool, the autotrophs began to drool
Neanderthals developed tools, we built a wall (we built the pyramids)
Math, science, history, unraveling the mystery
That all started with the Big Bang (bang!)

Since the dawn of man is really not that long
As every galaxy was formed in less time
Than it takes to sing this song
A fraction of a second and the elements were made

The bipeds stood up straight
The dinosaurs all met their fate
They tried to leap but they were late
And they all died (they froze their asses off)

The oceans and Pangea
See ya wouldn't wanna be ya
Set in motion by the same Big Bang
It all started with the Big Bang

It's expanding ever outward, but one day
It will pause and start to go the other way

Collapsing ever inward
We won't be here, it won't be heard
Our best and brightest figure
That it'll make an even bigger bang

Australopithecus would really have been sick of us
Debating how we're here they're catching deer (we're catching viruses)
Religion or astronomy, Descartes or Deuteronomy
It all started with the Big Bang

Music and mythology
Einstein and astrology
It all started with the Big Bang
It all started with the Big Bang!

sound_files.title: A Thousand Miles
sound_files.lyrics:
A Thousand Miles
Vanessa Carlton

Making my way downtown walking fast
(Camino al centro caminando rápido)
Faces pass and I'm home bound
(Rostros pasan y estoy confinado en casa)
Staring blankly ahead just making my way
(Mirando fijamente al frente solo haciendo mi camino)

(Abriéndose paso entre la multitud)

And I miss you
(Y te extraño)
And now I wonder
(Y ahora me pregunto)
If I could fall into the sky
(Si pudiera caer al cielo)

(¿Crees que el tiempo me pasaría?)
'Cause you know I'd walk a thousand miles
(Porque sabes que caminaría mil millas)
If I could just see you tonight
(Si tan solo pudiera verte esta noche)

(Siempre son momentos como estos cuando pienso en ti)

(Y me pregunto si alguna vez piensas en mí)
'Cause everything's so wrong and I don't belong
(Porque todo está muy mal y no pertenezco)
Living in your precious memories
(Viviendo en tus preciosos recuerdos)

'Cause I'll need you
(Porque te necesitaré)
And I'll miss you
(Y te extrañaré)
And now I wonder
(Y ahora me pregunto)
If I could fall into the sky
(Si pudiera caer al cielo)
Do you think time would pass me by?
(¿Crees que el tiempo me pasaría?)
'Cause you know I'd walk a thousand miles
(Porque sabes que caminaría mil millas)
If I could just see you tonight
(Si tan solo pudiera verte esta noche)

And I, I don't want to let you know
(Y yo, no quiero hacerte saber)
I, I drown in your memory
(Yo me ahogo en tu memoria)
I, I don't want to let this go
(Yo no quiero dejar ir esto)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/English/Rolling in the deep.mp3
sound_files.title: Rolling In The Deep
sound_files.lyrics:
Rolling In The Deep
(En La Más Profunda Desesperación)

There's a fire starting in my heart
(Hay un incendio empezando en mi corazón)
Reaching a fever pitch,
(Alcanzando su clímax)
And it's bringing me out the dark
(Y me está sacando de la oscuridad.)
Finally I can see you crystal clear
(Finalmente te puedo ver como a un cristal limpio,)
Go ahead and sell me out 
(Sigue adelante y traicióname)
And I'll lay your ship bare
(Que yo expondré totalmente toda tu falsa relación.)
See how I'll leave with every piece of you
(Observa como me marcharé con cada pedazo de ti,)
Don't underestimate the things that I will do
(No subestimes las cosas que haré)

There's a fire starting in my heart
(Hay un incendio comenzando en mi corazón)
Reaching a fever pitch
(Alcanzando su clímax)
And it's bringing me out the dark
(Y me está sacando a la luz)

The scars of your love remind me of us
(Las cicatrices de tu amor me recuerdan a nosotros)
They keep me thinking that we almost had it all
(Me dejan pensando en que lo tuvimos casi todo)
The scars of your love, 
(Las cicatrices de tu amor,)
They leave me breathless
(Me dejan sin aliento)
I can't help feeling
(No puedo evitar la nostalgia)

We could have had it all
(Pudimos haberlo tenido todo)
Rolling in the deep
(En esta gran depresión)
(Tears are gonna fall, rolling in the deep)
([Las lágrimas caerán, moviéndose en la profundidad])
You had my heart inside of your hand
(Tú tuviste mi corazón en tus manos)
(You're gonna wish you never had met me)
([Vas a desear nunca haberme conocido])
And you played it to the beat
(E hiciste con él lo que quisiste)
(Tears are gonna fall, rolling in the deep)
([Las lágrimas descenderán, ondulando en la profundidad])

Baby, I have no story to be told
(Cariño, no tengo ninguna historia que contar)
But I've heard one of you
(Pero he escuchado una de ti)
And I'm gonna make your head burn
(Y voy a hacer que tu inteligencia arda)
Think of me in the depths of your despair
(Al pensar en mí en lo más profundo de tu desesperación)
Making a home down there
(Hacer un hogar allí)
As mine sure won't be shared
(Y segura de que no lo compartiré)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/English/Life On Mars_.mp3
sound_files.title: Life On Mars?
sound_files.lyrics:
Life on Mars?
(Vida en Marte?)

It's a God-awful small affair
(Es un pequeño y terrible asunto de Dios)
To the girl with the mousy hair
(con la chica del pelo pardusco)
But her mummy is yelling no
(pero su madre esta gritando no)
And her daddy has told her to go
(y su padre le ha dicho que se vaya)

But her friend is nowhere to be seen
(pero su amigo no está en ningún lado para ser visto)
Now she walks through her sunken dream
(ahora ella camina a travéz de su sueño hundido)
To the seat with the clearest view
(hacia el asiento con la mejor vista)
And she's hooked to the silver screen
(y ella está enganchada a la pantalla plateada)

But the film is a saddening bore
(pero la película es un aburrimiento lamentable)

For she's lived it ten times or more
(porque ella la ha vivido diez veces o más)
She could spit in the eyes of fools
(ella podría escupir en los ojos de los tontos)
As they ask her to focus on
(mientras que le piden que se centre en)

Sailors fighting in the dance hall
(los marineros peleando en la sala de baile)
Oh man, look at those cavemen go
(Mira a esos cavernícolas yendo)
It's the freakiest show
(Es el show más estrafalario)

Take a look at the lawman
(mira al abogado)
Beating up the wrong guy
(pegando al chico equivocado)
Oh man, wonder if he'll ever know
(Te preguntas si él sabrá alguna vez)
He's in the best selling show
(que está en el show que mejor vende?)

Is there life on Mars?
(Hay vida en marte?)

It's on America's tortured brow
(Está en la frente torturada de America)
That Mickey Mouse has grown up a cow
(Mickey Mouse se ha convertido en vaca)
Now the workers have struck for fame
(ahora los trabajadores han alcanzado la fama)
'Cause Lennon's on sale again
(porque Lennon está a la venta otra vez)

See the mice in their million hordes
(mira a los ratones en sus millones de hordas)
From Ibiza to the Norfolk Broads
(desde Ibiza hasta Norfolk Broads)
Rule Britannia is out of bounds
(Gran Bretaña está fuera del límites)
To my mother, my dog, and clowns
(para mi madre, mi perro y los payasos)

But the film is a saddening bore
(pero la película es un aburrimiento lamentable)
'Cause I wrote it ten times or more
(porque la escribí diez veces o más)
It's about to be writ again
(it's about to be writ again)
As I ask you to focus on
(as they ask her to focus on)

I know I'll survive
(Sé que voy a sobrevivir)

Sure I'll make it through

And I'll even learn to live without you
(E incluso aprenderé a vivir sin ti)

I wish I could scream out loud

(Que Te amo)

Wish I could say to you
(Ojalá pudiera decirte)
Don't go don't go don't go but
(No vayas, no vayas, no vayas, pero)

Don't turn around
(No dar vuelta)
'Cause you're gonna see my heart breaking
(Porque vas a ver mi corazón romper)

Don't turn around

I don't want you seeing me cry

Just walk away

sound_files.lyrics:

(Cambios)
David Bowie
(David Bowie)

(Y mi tiempo se estaba volviendo loco)

(Un millón de calles sin salida y)

(Cada vez que pensaba que lo había hecho)

(Parecía que el sabor no era tan dulce)

So I turned myself to face me
(Entonces me volví para enfrentarme)

(Pero nunca he vislumbrado)
How the others must see the faker

changes

(Voltea y enfrenta lo extraño)

(Tendrá que haber un hombre diferente)

(El tiempo puede cambiarme)

(Pero no puedo rastrear el tiempo)

I watch the ripples change their size
(Veo las ondas cambiar su tamaño)
But never leave the stream
(Pero nunca abandones la corriente)
Of warm impermanence
(De cálida impermanencia)
And so the days float through my eyes
(Y así los días flotan en mis ojos)
But still the days seem the same
(Pero aun así los días parecen iguales)

(Mientras intentan cambiar sus mundos)

changes

(No les digas que crezcan y salgan de eso)

Where's your shame?

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/English/Falling from Grace.mp3
sound_files.title: Falling from Grace
sound_files.lyrics:
Falling From Grace
(Cayendo En Desgracia)

You make me satisfied
(Me satisfaces)
You only want to ride
(Sólo quieres montar)
But that's alright by me
(Pero eso está bien por mi)
We happen to be free
(Resultamos ser libres)
For what tomorrow brings
(Por lo que trae el mañana)
No peace and broken wings
(Nada de paz y alas rotas)
It may have been so good
(Pudo haber sido tan bueno)
But now it's understood
(Pero ahora se entiende)
'Twas just a night
(Que tan sólo fue una noche)
 
If I could tear my heart
(Si pudiera partir mi corazón)
And keep it miles apart
(Y mantenerlo separado por millas)
From love of beast or man
(Del amor de la bestia o del hombre)
And never give a damn
(Y que nunca me importe nada)
If I could learn to lie
(Si pudiera aprender a mentir)
And never show my pride
(Y nunca mostrar mi orgullo)
I'd be just like the rest
(Sería igual al resto)
Be someone I detest
(Sería alguien a quien odio)
 
I'm always looking for the sun
(Siempre estoy buscando el sol)
I'm always looking for the sun to shine
(Siempre estoy buscando que el sol brille)
 
Love...
(El amor...)
Destroys the best of us
(Destruye lo mejor de nosotros)
Then leaves the rest of us
(Luego deja al resto de nosotros)
Thinking perhaps we'll die
(Pensando que talvez moriremos)
Yet still we stay alive
(Sin embargo, nos mantenemos vivos)
Lost in a hollow frame
(Perdidos en un marco vacío)
With lonely tears remain
(Con lágrimas solitarias)
Not knowing our life's worth
(Sin saber el valor de nuestra vida)
Dragging around the earth
(Arrastrando por la tierra)
How false the light
(Cuán falsa la luz)
 
You make me satisfied
(Me satisfaces)
You only want to ride
(Sólo quieres montar)
But that's alright by me
(Pero eso está bien por mi)
We happen to be free
(Resultamos ser libres)
And if we fall from grace
(Y si caemos en desgracia)
At least we had a taste
(Por lo menos probamos un bocado)
Of something more than this
(De algo más que este)
Unresolved black abyss
(Abismo negro sin resolver)
 
I'm always looking for the sun
(Siempre estoy buscando el sol)
I'm only looking for the sun to shine
(Siempre estoy buscando que el sol brille)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/English/The Sound Of Silence.mp3
sound_files.title: The Sound Of Silence
sound_files.lyrics:
The sound of silence
(El sonido del silencio)

Hello darkness, my old friend
(Hola oscuridad, vieja amiga,)
I've come to talk with you again
(he venido de nuevo a hablar contigo,)
Because a vision softly creeping
(porque una visión, arrastrándose suavemente,)
Left its seeds while I was sleeping
(depositó sus semillas mientras yo estaba durmiendo,)
And the vision that was planted in my brain 
(y la visión que fue plantada en mi cerebro,)
Still remains
(todavía permanece.)
Within the sound of silence 
(Dentro del sonido del silencio,)

In restless dreams I walked alone 
(en agitados sueños yo caminaba solo,)
Narrow streets of cobblestone 
(por calles estrechas adoquinadas,)
Beneath the halo of a street lamp 
(bajo el halo de una farola,)
I turned my collar to the cold and damp 
(giré el cuello hacia el frío y la humedad,)
When my eyes were stabbed
(cuando mis ojos fueron apuñalados)
By the flash of a neon light 
(por el fogonazo de una luz de neón,)
That split the night 
(que partió la noche,)
And touched the sound of silence.
(y tocó el sonido del silencio.)

And in the naked light I saw 
(Y a la luz desnuda vi)
Ten thousand people, maybe more 
(a diez mil personas, quizás más,)
People talking without speaking 
(gente conversando sin hablar,)
People hearing without listening 
(gente oyendo sin escuchar,)
People writing songs
(gente escribiendo canciones)
That voices never share 
(que las voces nunca comparten.)
And no one dare 
(Y nadie se atreve)
Disturb the sound of silence
(a perturbar el sonido del silencio.)

"Fools" said I You do not know
("Tontos" les dije yo, no sabeís)
silence like a cancer grows
(que el silencio crece como un cáncer,)
Hear my words that I might teach you 
(escuchad mis palabras, que podría enseñaros,)
Take my arms that I might reach you 
(agarrad mis brazos que podrían alcanzaros,)
But my words like silent raindrops fell 
(pero mis palabras cayeron como silenciosas gotas de lluvia,)
And echoed in the wells of silence
(e hicieron eco en los pozos del silencio.)

And the people bowed and prayed 
(Y la gente se inclinó y rezó,)
To the neon god they made 
(al Dios de neón que habían construido,)
And the sign flashed out its warning 
(y el letrero emitió su aviso,)
In the words that it was forming 
(con las palabras que estaba formando,)
And the sign said 
(y el letrero decía:)
The words of the prophets
("Las palabras de los profetas)
Are written on the subway walls 
(están escritas en las paredes del metro,)
And tenement halls
(y en los vestíbulos de las casas,)
And whispered in the sounds of silence
(y susurradas en los sonidos del silencio".)

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/English/All star.mp3
sound_files.title: All Star
sound_files.lyrics:
All Star
(Todas Las Estrellas)

Somebody once told me the world is gonna roll me
(Alguien me dijo una vez el mundo se me va a rodar)
I ain't the sharpest tool in the shed
(¿No es la mayor herramienta en la nave)
She was looking kind of dumb with her finger 
(Ella estaba buscando clase de mudos con su pulgar)
and her thumb
(y su dedo de la mano)
In the shape of an "L" on her forehead
(En la forma de una "L" en su frente)

Well the years start coming and they don't stop coming
(Bueno comienzo de los años venideros y no dejan de venir)
Fed to the rules and I hit the ground running
(Fed a las normas y pongan en acción inmediatamente)
Didn't make sense not to live for fun
(¿No tiene sentido de no vivir por diversión)
Your brain gets smart but your head gets dumb
(Su cerebro recibe inteligente, pero su cabeza se muda)

So much to do so much to see
(Por lo tanto, mucho por hacer tanto que ver)
So what's wrong with taking the back streets
(Entonces, ¿qué hay de malo en tomar las calles de nuevo)
You'll never know if you don't go
(Usted nunca sabe si no ir)
You'll never shine if you don't glow
(Nunca brillar si no brillo)

Hey now you're an All Star get your game on, go play
(Hey ahora que usted es un All Star obtener su juego, ir jugar)
Hey now you're a Rock Star get the show on get paid
(Hey ahora eres una estrella del rock obtener el show en recibir sus pagos)
And all that glitters is gold
(Y todo lo que reluce es oro)
Only shooting stars break the mold
(Sólo estrellas fugaces romper el molde)

It's a cool place and they say it gets colder
(Es un lugar fresco y decir, el fichero es más frío)
You're bundled up now but wait 'til you get older
(Usted nuevo paquete de esperar, pero hasta ahora 'til que envejece)
But the meteor men beg to differ
(Pero el meteoro mendigar a los hombres difieren)
Judging by the hole in the satellite picture
(A juzgar por el agujero en la imagen de satélite)

The ice we skate is getting pretty thin
(Los patines de hielo que se está volviendo bastante delgada)
The waters getting warm so you might as well swim
(Las aguas cálidas conseguir así que puede nadar y)
My world's on fire how about yours
(Mi mundo en el fuego acerca de la forma en la suya)
That's the way I like it and I never get bored
(Esa es la forma que me gusta y nunca me aburro)

Somebody once asked 
(Alguien preguntó una vez)
could I spare some change for gas
(¿podría cambiar algunas de repuesto para el gas)
I need to get myself away from this place
(Yo voy a tener yo mismo fuera de este lugar)
I said yep what a concept
(Yep he dicho lo que un concepto)
I could use a little fuel myself
(Yo podría utilizar un poco de combustible a mí mismo)
And we could all use a little change
(Y todos podemos utilizar un poco de cambio)

Well the years start coming and they don't stop coming
(Bueno comienzo de los años venideros y no dejan de venir)
Fed to the rules and I hit the ground running
(Fed a las normas y pongan en acción inmediatamente)
Didn't make sense not to live for fun
(¿No tiene sentido de no vivir por diversión)
Your brain gets smart but your head gets dumb
(Su cerebro recibe inteligente, pero su cabeza se muda)

So much to do so much to see
(Por lo tanto, mucho por hacer tanto que ver)
So what's wrong with taking the back streets
(Entonces, ¿qué hay de malo en tomar las calles de nuevo)
You'll never know if you don't go
(Usted nunca sabe si no ir)
You'll never shine if you don't glow
(Nunca brillar si no brillo)

Robert's got a quick hand

He won't tell you his plan

hanging out his mouth

in a box of fun things

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/English/Fernando.mp3
sound_files.title: Fernando
sound_files.lyrics:
Fernando
(Fernando)

Can you hear the drums Fernando?
(¿Puedes escuchar los tambores Fernando?)
I remember long ago
(Yo recuerdo hace mucho tiempo)
another starry night like this
(otra noche estrellada como esta)
In the firelight Fernando
(A la luz del fuego Fernando)
You were humming to yourself
(Rumoreabas para ti mismo)
and softly strumming your guitar
(y suavemente rasgueabas tu guitarra)
I could hear the distant drums
(Yo podía escuchar los tambores distantes)
And sounds of bugle calls
(Y sonidos de llamadas de clarín)
were coming from afar
(estaban viniendo desde lo lejos)

They were closer now Fernando
(Estaban mas cerca ahora Fernando)
Every hour every minute seemed to last eternally
(Cada hora, cada minuto parecía durar eternamente)
I was so afraid Fernando
(Tenía tanto miedo Fernando)
We were young and full of life
(Éramos jóvenes y llenos de vida)
and none of us prepared to die
(y ninguno de nosotros estaba preparado para morir)
And I'm not ashamed to say
(Y no siento vergüenza de decir)
The roar of guns
(Que el rugir de las armas)
and cannons almost made me cry
(y cañones casi me hicieron llorar)

There was something in the air that night
(Había algo en el aire aquella noche)
The stars were bright, Fernando
(Las estrellas eran luminosas, Fernando)
They were shining there for you and me
(Ellas estaban brillando allá por ti y por mi)
For liberty, Fernando
(Por libertad, Fernando)
Though I never thought that we could lose
(Aunque nunca pensé que podríamos perder)
There's no regret
(No me arrepiento)
If I had to do the same again
(Si tuviera que hacerlo nuevamente)
I would, my friend, Fernando
(Lo haría, mi amigo, Fernando)

Now we're old and grey Fernando
(Ahora estamos viejos canosos Fernando)
And since many years
(Y hace muchos años)
I haven't seen a rifle in your hand
(que no he visto un rifle en tu mano)
Can you hear the drums Fernando?
(¿Puedes escuchar los tambores Fernando?)
Do you still recall the frightful night
(¿Todavía recuerdas la espantosa noche)
we crossed the Rio Grande?
(que cruzamos Río Grande?)
I can see it in your eyes
(Puedo verlo en tus ojos)
How proud you were to fight
(Que orgulloso eras de luchar)
for freedom in this land
(por la libertad en esta tierra)

There was something in the air that night
(Había algo en el aire aquella noche)
The stars were bright, Fernando
(Las estrellas eran luminosas, Fernando)
They were shining there for you and me
(Ellas estaban brillando allá por ti y por mi)
For liberty, Fernando
(Por libertad, Fernando)
Though I never thought that we could lose
(Aunque nunca pensé que podríamos perder)
There's no regret
(No me arrepiento)
If I had to do the same again
(Si tuviera que hacerlo nuevamente)
I would, my friend, Fernando
(Lo haría, mi amigo, Fernando)

There was something in the air that night
(Había algo en el aire aquella noche)
The stars were bright, Fernando
(Las estrellas eran luminosas, Fernando)
They were shining there for you and me
(Ellas estaban brillando allá por ti y por mi)
For liberty, Fernando
(Por libertad, Fernando)
Though I never thought that we could lose
(Aunque nunca pensé que podríamos perder)
There's no regret
(No me arrepiento)
If I had to do the same again

Yes, if I had to do the same again

sound_files.src: /home/avill/MP3Autorun/music/English/Go pato.mp3
sound_files.title: Go pato
sound_files.lyrics:
Pato Banton
(Pato Banton)
Go Pato
(Ir Pato)

Now all lovers of positive reggae music
(Ahora todos los amantes de la música reggae positivo)
could you please fasten your seat belts 
(¿podría por favor abrochen sus cinturones de seguridad)
because we have lift off. 
(porque hemos levantar.)

Go Pato! everybody telling me to
(Vaya Pato! a todo el mundo me decía que)
Go Pato! all over America! 
(Vaya Pato! en toda América!)

I want the whole wide world to know
(Quiero que el mundo entero sepa)
that Pato Banton is on the go.
(Pato Banton es que en el camino.)
Just like a tree that plant by the rivers of water
(Al igual que un árbol que se planta por los ríos de agua)

I will surely grow.
(Seguramente crecerá.)
Everyday I kneel and pray
(Todos los días me arrodillo y rezo)
that Jah will guide me on my way.
(que Jah me guiará en mi camino.)
I wanna be good yes I wanna do right
(Quiero ser bueno sí, yo quiero hacer lo correcto)
and I don't want to go astray.
(y yo no quiero ir por mal camino.)
